commands.review_summary:
Threads sourceReplyDeliveryMode into generated-media completion wake parameters and changes image/video/music completion prompts/tests to choose deterministic message-tool versus MEDIA-line instructions.

PR surface: Source +43, Tests +82. Total +125 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction is attached. Current main does contain the conditional generated-media reply instruction, but the reported Discord ambiguous-recipient retry and duplicate-media behavior still needs real transport evidence.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer message-delivery review, not an automated repair.

target.title: fix(agents): make media generation reply instruction deterministic based on sourceReplyDeliveryMode
target.body:
## Problem The completion prompt for image/video generation was ambiguous: > "Use the current visible-reply contract: if this session requires message-tool replies, call message(action=\"send\")..." Models (especially smaller/quantized ones) often misinterpret this conditional and call the message tool for channel deliveries with raw Discord channel IDs instead of the required `channel:` prefix format. This causes repeated `"Ambiguous Discord recipient"` errors, and since the automatic delivery path also fires on each retry, the generated media gets delivered multiple times — one duplicate image per failed message-tool retry. ## Fix Resolve `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` before building the reply instruction and make the prompt **deterministic** — no conditionals for the model to misinterpret: - **`message_tool_only` sessions** (DMs): explicitly instruct to call `message(action="send")` and NOT use MEDIA: lines - **`automatic` sessions** (channels/groups): explicitly instruct to use MEDIA: lines and NOT use the message tool The delivery mode is resolved using the same logic as `deliverSubagentAnnouncement` (`resolveSourceReplyDeliveryMode` + `resolveCompletionChatType`), so the instruction is consistent with the actual delivery path chosen by the subsystem. ## Changes - `media-generate-background-shared.ts`: `buildMediaGenerationReplyInstruction` now accepts `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` and returns deterministic instructions. `wakeMediaGenerationTaskCompletion` resolves the delivery mode before building the instruction. - `image-generate-background.ts`, `video-generate-background.ts`: thread `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` through the completion params type. - `media-generate-background-shared.test.ts`: tests for both delivery mode branches. ## Repro 1. Set up an OpenClaw instance with a Discord channel connection 2. Request image generation 3. Observe the model calling `message(action="send")` with `channelId: ""` instead of `to: "channel:"` 4. Watch "Ambiguous Discord recipient" errors repeat and duplicate images appear in channel ## Related - #88141 — Pete's delivery path fix (merged into 2026.5.30-beta.1) - #88323 — generated media delivery dedupe (complementary defense layer) --- ## ⚠️ Real Behavior Proof — PENDING This PR is currently a **draft**. Per CONTRIBUTING.md, real behavior proof is required before requesting review. **Pending:** - [ ] Test on a live OpenClaw instance with a Discord channel connection - [ ] Verify image/video generation sends exactly one image to channel (no message-tool retry loop) - [ ] Verify DM delivery still uses message tool correctly - [ ] Include session logs showing the deterministic reply instruction The Dicky instance has been manually patched with the same fix and is pending testing. Once behavior proof is confirmed, this PR will be marked ready for review.
Manual Dicky patch (dist JS, temporary) Patched openclaw-tools-rOaUDDLa.js on Dicky (beta 2026.5.30-beta.1): replaced ambiguous buildMediaGenerationReplyInstruction with deterministic version that passes sourceReplyDeliveryMode. Channel sessions get "Do NOT use the message tool for delivery"; message_tool_only sessions get explicit message-tool instruction.
target.author: compoodment
